Title:
Raspberry Pi based
Interactive Home
Automation
System through E-
mail[1]
Methodology:
This paper presents
a model that is built
using Raspberry Pi.
Features:
 Model controlled using
python programming
language.
 Notifies the user
through Email about the
status of LED.
Limitations:
 Temperature monitoring
and fire alert system is
not implemented.
 No proper user
interactive system(app)
is present.
 It can't be accessed from
a long distance.
 Expensive model.

Title:
Design of a Home
Automation
System Using
Arduino[2]
Methodology:
It shows a system
built using Arduino
WiFi shield module,
Bluetooth, Arduino
Mega and Web-
Application.
Features:
 WiFi enabled system.
 Security alerting system.
 Web-Application used
as an interface for
displaying gas detection,
weather.
Limitations:
 Voice- enabled system
is not available.
 Does not include AI
Technology for
performing various
tasks.

Title:
Design and
implementation of
IOT based
automation for
smart home[3]
Methodology:
This paper shows a
system built using
Esp 8266 WiFi
module, Arduino
Mega and virtuino
app.
Features:
 WiFi enabled system.
 Home appliance app.
which controls many
devices connected.
 Security alerting system.
Limitations:
 Smart voice assistant is
absent from the app.
 No fire alert system is
present.

Title:
Smart Energy
Efficient Home
Automation
System Using
IoT[4]
Methodology:
Here the paper
presents a model
built using
Esp 8266, Adafruit,
IFTTT.
Features:
 Home appliances are
controlled through
IFTTT and Adafruit.
Limitations:
 The AI assistant app is
not there to control
home appliances.
 Temperature monitoring
and fire alert system is
not implemented.

Title:
Smart Home
Automation using
AI assistant and
IoT
Features:
 ZOYA, the AI Assistant
app helps to ease the
work of user by opening
various apps and also
control different
electronic appliances.
 The model has
temperature, humidity
and fire security alarm.
 Long distance
communication is
possible via ZOYA.
Limitations:
 The brightness of the
light cannot be
controlled.
 ZOYA does not have
access to all the apps, it
can only open limited
applications.
